ObjectAttribute.name: isBirthright
ObjectAttribute.Description: Exclude Birthright Entitlements

ObjectAttribute.name: apbirthrightPopulations
ObjectAttribute.Description: Comma Separated Birthright Populations - Will be used for Birthright Role Automation

ObjectAttribute.name: manualOverride
ObjectAttribute.Description: Manual Override Entitlemnet Birthright, Privileged, and Logical Application Settings

ObjectAttribute.name: entBusApprovers
ObjectAttribute.Description: Enter a comma separated Cube Ids or WorkGroups

ObjectAttribute.name: entBusApprovalRule
ObjectAttribute.Description: This rule can be used to override 1st Level Business Approvers

ObjectAttribute.name: additionalEntBusApprovers
ObjectAttribute.Description: Enter a comma separated Cube Ids or WorkGroups

ObjectAttribute.name: additionalEntBusApproversRule
ObjectAttribute.Description: This rule can be used to override 2nd Level Business Approvers

ObjectAttribute.name: entAppName
ObjectAttribute.Description: Either Single or Comma separated Logical Business Aplications(Shared Databases, Shared Groups, etc)

ObjectAttribute.name: entPrivileged
ObjectAttribute.Description: Privileged Entitlement

ObjectAttribute.name: apaccountType
ObjectAttribute.Description: Comma Separated Privileged Entitlement Types

ObjectAttribute.name: approvalType
ObjectAttribute.Description: Comma separated approvers list for the access request

ObjectAttribute.name: additionalApprover
ObjectAttribute.Description: Approving identity if the approval type has identity

ObjectAttribute.name: ascBusinessApplication
ObjectAttribute.Description: Deprecated on 05/19/2021 (CHG594170)

ObjectAttribute.name: privileged
ObjectAttribute.Description: Privileged entitlement

ObjectAttribute.name: privilegedIdentity
ObjectAttribute.Description: True/False attribute whether to treat the identity level approval as privileged

ObjectAttribute.name: snowAssignmentGroup
ObjectAttribute.Description: The assignment group name in ServiceNow that will handle the fulfillment of the request

ObjectAttribute.name: snowAssignmentGroupName
ObjectAttribute.Description: Deprecated on 05/19/2021 (CHG594170)

ObjectAttribute.name: entSnowAssignmentGroupName
ObjectAttribute.Description: The assignment group name in ServiceNow that will handle the fulfillment of the request

ObjectAttribute.name: entMinistry
ObjectAttribute.Description: Ascension Ministry associated with the entitlement.

ObjectAttribute.name: entKeyword
ObjectAttribute.Description: Search Keywords associated with the entitlement.
